content:
## Account Choices
Northstar Bank has two listed savings options for personal customers: Bronze Savings Account and Gold Plus Savings Account. Use only these account names when comparing savings products.

| Account | Monthly fee | APY | Minimum opening deposit |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| Bronze Savings Account | $0 | 1.13% | $100 |
| Gold Plus Savings Account | $0 | 3.8% | $2500 |

## Balance and Fee Notes
Neither savings account uses a fee-waiver balance: Bronze Savings Account lists $0, and Gold Plus Savings Account lists $0. Do not describe either account as having a monthly maintenance charge when the monthly fee is $0 or $0.

## Early Closure Comparison
A Bronze Savings Account closed within 60 days carries a $20 early closure fee. A Gold Plus Savings Account closed within 180 days carries a $75 early closure fee. For closure handling, see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy".

## Customer Fit
When a customer can meet the higher opening deposit, Gold Plus Savings Account offers the higher APY. When the customer wants the lower required opening deposit, Bronze Savings Account is the listed lower-entry option. For checking products, see "Checking Account Comparison Guide".
title: Savings Account Comparison Guide
